title: (Bee's) Vanilla+ Collections
description: My take on an updated look and feel of Minecraft
body: ### About My **Vanilla+ Collections** is a simple, unintrusive resource pack that improves and cleans up Minecraft textures and models which I felt like needed it! That includes items, blocks, GUI, and various miscellaneous things. And it keeps things very faithful to vanilla, thus is usable with mods without seeming out of place. The latest version includes about 200 textures! That's it! I hope you like it! See the [gallery](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/vanillacollections/gallery) for some screenshots of the pack. ### Collections Here are my other packs that go well with this one! - [**Fancy Crops**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fancy-crops) ∗ my take on prettier crop farming with new variable textures and models - [**Fine Armoury**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fine-armoury) ∗ many retextures of tools, weapons, and armour - [**Serified Font**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/serified-font) ∗ my take on a much fancier font - [**Fluffy Carpets and Wool**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/fluffy-carpets) ∗ my take on much fluffier wool and carpets (currently unavailable on Modrinth) - [**Cosier Beds**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/cozier-beds) ∗ my take on prettier and cosier bed models (currently unavailable on Modrinth) - [**Banner Pattern Clarity**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/banner-pattern-clarity) ∗ provides distinctive (and pretty) banner pattern item textures - [**Blockier Goat Horn**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/blockier-goat-horn) ∗ gives the goat horn a silly model in your hand I also make all kinds of data packs, like [**Geophilic**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/geophilic), the vanilla biome overhaul pack! You should visit my profile to see them all! You can also visit my [**website**](https://everloste.github.io/) to see everything I do, join my [**Discord community**](https://everloste.github.io/discord), or give me a small tip on [**Ko-fi**](https://everloste.github.io/ko-fi). Thank you and have fun! <3
